label: Pipeline test

files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: List Reports - Successful Retrieval
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/reports returns a list of reports when reports exist.
scenarios.expected_result: A list of report summaries is returned.

scenarios.title: List Reports - No Reports Exist
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/reports returns an empty list when no reports exist.

scenarios.title: Get Report Details - Successful Retrieval
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/reports/{run_id} returns report details for a valid run_id.
preconditions: A report with the specified run_id exists.

scenarios.title: Get Report Details - Run ID Not Found
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/reports/{run_id} returns a 404 error when the run_id does not exist.

scenarios.title: Delete Report - Successful Deletion
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/reports/{run_id} deletes the specified report.
preconditions: A report with the specified run_id exists.
scenarios.expected_result: The report is deleted, and a 404 is returned when trying to retrieve it.

scenarios.title: Start Pipeline Run - Successful Queueing
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/pipeline/run successfully queues a new pipeline run.
scenarios.expected_result: A 202 Accepted response with a run_id is returned.

scenarios.title: Start Pipeline Run - Invalid Input
scenarios.description: Verify that the API endpoint /api/pipeline/run returns an error for invalid input.
scenarios.expected_result: A 422 Unprocessable Entity error is returned.
